title: agrostis schaffneri
intro: Agrostis schaffneri, also known as Schaffner's bentgrass, is a type of grass native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can help to soothe wounds and prevent infection. The health benefits of Agrostis schaffneri include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and potentially aiding in the treatment of certain skin conditions. Agrostis schaffneri can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or topical creams to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
